"Ushbu funksiya ayni vaqtda faqat telefoningizdagi matnli xabarlardan ularni telefoningizdan tashqarida yuklamasdan yoki saqlamasdan foydalanadi.
Barcha shaxsiy ma’lumotlaringiz, shu jumladan, moliyaviy tranzaksiyalarga aloqador ma’lumotlar telefoningizda qoladi, shuning uchun unga faqat siz kirishingiz mumkin.
Ushbu funksiyani istalgan vaqtda Parametrlarda oʻchirishingiz mumkin."

Antifishing dasturi matnli xabarlardagi zararli URL’larni aniqlay oladi. Bu funksiya tarmoq ulanishini talab qiladi va u quyidagi ma’lumotlarni olish uchun xizmat ta’minotchisiga roziligingizni berishingizni talab qiladi:

"O‘rnatgan mobil internet cheklovi sababli bu video qo‘ng‘iroqni amalga oshirib bo‘lmaydi.
Parametrlarda trafik cheklovi o‘zgartirilsinmi?"

Bu imkoniyatni yoqish orqali siz xabarlaringizni OTPlar mavjudligini aniqlash uchun ishlov berishga rozilik bildirasiz. Xabarlar faqat sizning telefoningizda ishlov beriladi va hech bir Samsung bilan ulashilmaydi.

Ushbu chatbot Mening chatbotlarimdan olib tashlansinmi?
Ushbu chatbot bilan amalga oshirilgan chatlar %1$s’ning %2$sTalab va shartlari%3$s o‘zgartirilishi mumkin.

Bu xizmat ta’minotchisi ushbu chatbot xulqiga, u taqdim etadigan ma’lumotlarga hamda foydalanuvchilarning shaxsiy ma’lumotlarini qonuniy to‘plash va ulardan foydalanishga mas’ul hisoblanadi. Samsung bu chatbot yordamida shaxsiy ma’lumotlaringizni to‘plamaydi yoki ulardan foydalanmaydi.

SK Telecom Co., Ltd., KT Corp., and LG Uplus Corp. are not parties in mail orders, and the obligations and responsibilities concerning the provision of product information and transactions fall on each seller.
To use this service, your phone number and certain data will be sent to Samsung.
By selecting the check boxes, you acknowledge that you have read and agree to the following terms.
Yuqoridagilarning barchasini o‘qib chiqdim va ularga roziman.
Using this service may result in data charges.
Please see the Privacy Notice to learn more.

"Ushbu orqali siz quyidagilarni tan olasiz va rozilik berasiz:
· Chatbot xizmati va sizga shunday xizmat orqali taqdim etilgan har qanday kontentning Samsung emas, balki %1$staqdim etilayotgani. · Chatbot xizmatidan foydalanishingizni %1$sTalab va shartlari boshqarishi va siz %1$s ga taqdim etadigan har qanday ma’lumot yoki shaxsiy ma’lumotlarga nisbatan %1$sMaxfiylik siyosatining qo‘llanishi. · Tegishli qonunlarda ruxsat berilgan darajada Samsung Chatbot xizmati va uning kontentlari yoki sizning ulardan foydalanishingiz bilan bog‘liq bo‘lgan har qanday javobgarlikni o‘z zimmasiga olishni yaqqol tarzda rad qiladi."

"You hereby acknowledge and agree that: · The Chatbot Service and any contents provided to you through such service, are being provided to you by T-Mobile, and not by Samsung. · Your use of Chatbot Service is governed by T-Mobile's Terms and Conditions, and that any information or personal data you provide to T-Mobile will be subject to T-Mobile's Privacy Policy. · Samsung expressly disclaims any liability in connection with Chatbot Service and its contents (or your use thereof), to the extent permitted under applicable law."

"Ushbu orqali siz tan olasiz va rozi bo‘lasizki:
Chatbot Xizmati va bunday xizmatlar orqali sizga taqdim etilgan har qanday kontent %1$s ga joylashtiriladi va uchinchi tomon chatbot ta’minotchilari tomonidan taqdim etiladi. Sizning Chatbot Xizmatidan foydalanishingizga nisbatan %1$s va uchinchi tomon chatbot ta’minotchilarining talab va shartlari qo‘llaniladi. Siz taqdim etadigan har qanday ma’lumot yoki shaxsiy ma’lumotlarga nisbatan %1$s yoki chatbot ta’minotchilarining maxfiylik siyosati qo‘llaniladi. Tegishli qonunlar ostida ruxsat berilgan darajada Samsung Chatbot Xizmati va uning kontentlari yoki sizning ulardan foydalanishingiz bilan bog‘liq bo‘lgan har qanday javobgarlikni yaqqol tarzda rad qiladi."
Chatbotlardan foydalanish uchun Chatting+’da ro‘yxatdan o‘tilsinmi?
Chatbotlar siz uchun foydali mahalliy ma’lumotlarni topishiga yordam berish uchun Joylashuvni yoqing.
Chatbotlaringiz zarur bo‘lganda, telefoningiz ma’lumotiga kirish imkoniga ega bo‘ladi.
Ushbu chatbotini Kontaktlarga qo‘shish uchun bu yerga teging. Qo‘shilgan chatbotlari Kontaktlardagi Mening chatbotlarim tagida ko‘rsatiladi.

Chatbotlar xaridlarni amalga oshirish, sayohatlarni rejalashtirish, yangiliklarni olish va boshqa shunga o‘xshash amallarni bajarishga yordam beradi. Alohida ilovalarni yuklab olishingiz kerak emas — suhbatlashishni hozir boshlang.

"Read the terms and conditions for each chatbot before messaging it.
Your mobile number is transmitted when you message a chatbot. Text “STOP” to a chatbot if you no longer wish to receive messages from it.
*Data rates may apply."

"Spam deganda tijoriy maqsadlarida yoki qonun tomonidan taqiqlangan sabablarga ko‘ra yuborilishi mumkin bo‘lgan keraksiz, so‘ralmagan qoʻngʻiroqlar yoki matnli xabarlar tushuniladi.
Spamning keng tarqalgan misollari orasida adashtiruvchi yoki noqonuniy qimor o‘yinlari yoki dori-darmonlar savdosi kabi noqonuniy faoliyatni reklama qiluvchi qoʻngʻiroqlar yoki matnli xabarlar kiradi."

"Fishing – bu o‘zini ishonchli manba sifatida ko‘rsatuvchi shaxs yoki guruh birovga qo‘ng‘iroq qilib yoki matnli xabar yuborib, shaxsiy yoki moliyaviy maxfiy ma’lumotlarini ulashishga aldash yoki majburlashga urinishidir.

*RCS afzalliklaridan foydalanish uchun barcha chat ishtirokchilari RCS xabar almashinuvini qo‘llab-quvvatlaydigan ilovadan foydalanishi kerak. Ayrim funksiyalar faqat birga-bir chatlarda ishlaydi.
SI tomonidan yaratilgan munosabat stikerlari va tuzilgan xabarlar
Matn kiritish ko‘rsatkichlari va katta guruhlar

Google Xabarlar yordamida suhbatlarni yangi bosqichga olib chiqing. Android va iOS* tizimlarida RCS foydalanuvchilari bilan yanada uzluksiz xabarlashishdan zavqlaning va chatlaringizni quyidagilar bilan kuchaytiring:
Maxsus mavzular va ekran effektlari bilan suhbatlarni yaxshilash uchun Google Xabarlarga yangilang.
Real vaqtda spamni aniqlash funksiyalari yordamida chatlarni himoyalash uchun Google Xabarlarini yangilang.
Chatlarni matn kiritish ko‘rsatkichlari kabi funksiyalar bilan yaxshilash uchun Google Xabarlarga yangilang.
Mavjud guruh chatlariga odamlarni osongina qo‘shish uchun Google Xabarlarga yangilang.
SI tomonidan yaratilgan munosabat stikerlari va tuzilgan xabarlar bilan yanada boyroq xabar almashish tajribasi uchun Google Xabarlariga yangilang.
Tasvir rezolyutsiyasi ruxsat etilgan miqdordan oshib ketdi.
When using the Chatting+ service in the mobile network environment such as LTE / 5G or when you roam overseas, additional charges may apply according to your data subscription plan.
When you roam overseas, a separate roaming rate will be charged.
Bu xizmatni istalgan paytda [Parametrlar > Chat parametrlari > Chat xabarlari] menyusiga kirib ishga tushirish yoki toʻxtatishingiz mumkin.
Agar narigi tomonda chat xizmati ishlamasa, u SMS/MMS orqali yuboriladi.
For more information, please visit the website of your carrier or contact the customer service center (114).

Chatting+’ni o‘chirsangiz, suhbatlashish (birga-bir va guruh chatlari), xabarlaringiz o‘qilganligi haqidagi tasdiqni olish yoki katta hajmdagi fayllarni ulashish imkoniga ega bo‘lmaysiz. Chat xizmati o‘chirilgan vaqtda matnli xabarlarni yuborishingiz mumkin bo‘ladi.
Chatting+’ni o‘chirsangiz, guruh chatidan foydalanish, xabarlaringiz o‘qilganligi haqidagi tasdiqni olish yoki katta hajmdagi fayllarni ulashish imkoniga ega bo‘lmaysiz.
Boshqa Chatting+ foydalanuvchilar bilan birga-bir va guruh suhbatlari va katta fayllarni o‘tkazish uchun Chatting+’dan foydalaning.

Boshqa Chatting+ foydalanuvchilar bilan birga-bir va guruh suhbatlari hamda katta fayllarni o‘tkazish uchun Chatting+’dan foydalaning. Qo‘ng‘iroqni boshqa raqamga yo‘naltirish yoki ikkitali raqam xizmatidan foydalanayotgan boʻlsangiz, Chatting+’dan foydalana olmaysiz.
Chatting+ boshqa Chatting+ foydalanuvchilar bilan birga-bir va guruh suhbatlari hamda katta fayllarni o‘tkazadigan messenjer xizmatidir. Chatting+’dan foydalanishni boshlash uchun ro‘yxatdan o‘ting.
Chatting+ ilovasidan 1 daqiqadan so‘ng ro‘yxatdan chiqishingiz mumkin.
Chatting+ ilovasidan %d daqiqadan so‘ng ro‘yxatdan chiqishingiz mumkin.
Chatting+ ilovasidan 1 daqiqadan so‘ng qayta ro‘yxatdan o‘tishingiz mumkin.
Chatting+ ilovasidan %d daqiqadan so‘ng qayta ro‘yxatdan o‘tishingiz mumkin.
Provision of Personal Data to Third Party (For the Samsung Chatbot)
Trafik ishlatma! Chatting+ b-n %d MB’dan kichik suratlar bepul yubor.
Joylashuvingizni manzildan nusxa ko‘chirmasdan yaqinlaringiz bilan osongina ulashing.
Noto‘g‘ri xabar yuborildimi? Bu muammo emas. 5 daqiqa ichida yuborgan xabarlaringizni chaqirib olishingiz yoki ularni 15 daqiqa ichida tahrirlab, qayta yuborishingiz mumkin.
Bu yerda hamma uchun joy bor! Bitta chat xonasida 100 tagacha inson bilan suhbatlashingiz mumkin.
Chatting+ Emoticon do‘konidagi stikerlar bilan chatlaringizni yanada qiziqarli qiling.
Spamdan charchadingizmi? Chatting+ yordamida zararli xabarlar va spamlarni avtomatik ravishda bloklab, o‘sha bezor qiladigan matnlarni kiruvchi xabarlaringizga tushishga yo‘l qo‘ymang.
Javob yuborish uchun unchalik tayyor emasmi? Kontakt ikonachasini bosib turish orqali siz yangi xabarlarni o‘qilganlik haqidagi hisobot yubormasdan dastlabki ko‘rib chiqishingiz mumkin.
Stiker mingta so‘z o‘rnini bosadi. Maxsus stikerlar va turli xil munosabat emojisi yordamida chatlarda o‘z tuyg‘ularingizni namoyon qiling.
Kompyuteringizdan qulay tarzda matnlar, fayllar, reaksiyalar va boshqalarni yuborish uchun ShKingizda Chatting+ ilovasini oling.
Xabarlaringizni yanada ifodali qilish uchun matn pufakchalariga emojilar qo‘shish to‘g‘risida tavsiyalar oling.
Ba’zi oluvchilarda faqatgina e-pochta manzillari saqlangan, telefon raqamlari emas. E-pochta manzillariga yuborish uchun xabar multimedia xabarga o‘giriladi.
Xabarlar yuborish uchun %s’da Qo‘ng‘iroq va xabar davomliligini yoqing.
Bu parametrlar telefoningiz orqali olingan xabarlarga qo‘llanilmaydi.
Telefoningiz sozlamalarida Boshqa qurilmalarda qo‘ng‘iroq qilish va xabar yuborish o‘chirilgan. Matnli xabar yuborish uchun uni yoqing.
Telefon raqamingiz va tarif rejangizdan foydalanib ushbu planshetdan qo‘ng‘iroq qilish yoki xabarlar yuborish uchun Sozlamalarda Boshqa qurilmada qo‘ng‘iroq qil va xabar yubor xizmatini yoqing.

Bu planshetdan %d’ga xabar yuborib bo‘lmaydi. Uning o‘rniga telefoningizdan foydalaning.
Telefoningiz orqali bu planshetdan %d’ga xabar yuborib bo‘lmadi. Xabar uning o‘rniga planshetingiz SIM-kartasi yordamida yuborildi.

When spam is reported, the contents of the messages (including attached files), the phone number (receiving number) of the complainant, the phone number that sent the messages, etc. are transmitted to the Korea Internet & Security Agency’s Illegal Spam Response Center. The phone number that sent the spam messages is then registered as a spam number, and subsequent messages are blocked. Data charges may apply if you are not connected to WiFi. After submitting your spam report, would you like to block incoming calls/messages by registering this number as a spam number?

In accordance with Article 52 of the “Act on Promotion of Information and Communications Network Utilization and Information Protection, etc.,” the Korea Internet & Security Agency shall collect and use the following personal information for the purpose of “consultations and handling complaints related to the transmission of advertisement information and Internet advertisements.” The personal information collected in this way shall be stored for 3 years in accordance with the “Rules for Handling Civil Complaints and Reports.”

1) Personal information collected when reporting spam: Mobile phone number of the complainant (receiving number), contents of the messages (including attached files) when reporting message spam, voice recordings of the complainant attached when reporting voice spam, etc.

2) Provision of personal information to third parties: Personal information may be provided to other agencies such as the police, the Central Radio Management Service, Korea Communications Commission, etc. to handle the spam reports, in ways such as investigation requests for illegal spam, taking administrative measures, and blocking
※ If you do not consent to the collection and use of your personal information, you will not be able to use the report feature as spam reports will not be able to be processed.

"Your report through the “Simple Mobile Phone Phishing Reporting Service” will be sent to the Korean National Police Agency, where it will be used to block phishing messages and phone numbers, or to investigate such scams. If necessary, it may also be forwarded to other organizations to support its purpose. The information provided when reporting include: 1) The phone number being reported (reply number) 2) Receiving number, phone number of the person reporting 3) Time of receipt, time of reporting, title, contents of the message (including attached files), call recording file (if attached), and more. For more details, please contact the National Counter Scam Center (1566-1188) or visit its webpage (https://www.counterscam112.go.kr)."

"The ‘Simple Mobile Phone Spam Reporting Service’ is only for reporting illegal mobile phone spam, and cannot be used for any other purposes. Reports are received by the Korea Internet & Security Agency. The information provided when reporting include: 1) Caller’s phone number (number for reply) you are reporting 2) Receiving number, mobile phone number of the person reporting 3) Time of receipt, time of reporting, title, contents of the message (including attached files), etc. The information provided is used for investigation requests for illegal spam, taking administrative measures, blocking, etc. If necessary, this information may be provided to other agencies for these purposes. However, this relevant information will not be provided to other agencies for the purpose of blocking. For more information, please contact the Korea Internet & Security Agency’s Illegal Spam Response Center at 118 (no area code) or visit the homepage (https://spam.kisa.or.kr)."

"Xabar berilgan spam - bu Koreya Internet va Xavfsizlik agentligining Koreya Spamlarga Javob berish Markazi (KSRC) tomonidan olingan spam. Xabarlar xabar yuboruvchi telefon raqami va qo‘ng‘iroqni qaytarish raqamini, xabar olingan va xabar berilgan vaqtni, xabar matni, tarkibi va u qaysi raqamdan spam sifatida xabar berilganligi haqidagi ma’lumotlarni o‘z ichiga oladi.
Bu ma’lumotlar surishtirish, ma’muriy joylashtirish va qabul qilishdan bosh tortish uchun ishlatilishi mumkin. Hisobotlarni ko‘rib chiqish uchun KSRC veb-saytiga o‘ting (spam.kisa.or.kr). Boshqa savollar bo‘yicha 118 qisqa raqamiga qo‘ng‘iroq qiling."
Xalqaro yuboruvchilardan kelgan xabarlar avtomatik ravishda bloklanadi. Nostandart mamlakat kodlariga ega bo‘lgan raqamlardan kelgan ba’zi xabarlar bloklanmasligi mumkin.

"Aqlli aniqlash shubhali deb belgilagan xabarlar avtomatik ravishda bloklanadi. Ular orasida noqonuniy qimor oʻyinlari yoki kreditlar kabi narsalarni reklama qiluvchi xabarlar ham boʻlishi mumkin.
Bloklangan xabarlarni koʻrishingiz va xatolik tufayli bloklangan barcha xabarlarni tiklashingiz mumkin, buning uchun Xabarlar sozlamalari > Raqamlarni bloklash va spam > Bloklangan xabarlarga o‘ting."
AI filtri shubhali deb belgilagan xabarlarni bloklash orqali qo‘shimcha himoya darajasini qo‘shing.

"In accordance with Article 2-7 (2) 2, 6, and 7 of the Special Act on the prevention of loss caused by telecommunications-based financial fraud and refund for loss, the Korean National Police Agency collects and uses the following personal information in order to “receive and process reports on telecommunications financial fraud,” “to request suspension of provision of telecommunications services for telephone numbers used in telecommunications financial fraud,” and “to analyze data on information such as phone numbers and fraudulent accounts used in telecommunications financial fraud and disseminate information to relevant government agencies,” and the collected information shall be stored for 10 years.
"

"1) Personal information collected upon report: Mobile phone number of the reporter, text content (including attachments) when reporting via text message, and the recorded voice of the reporter attached when reporting via a call, etc.
2) Provision of personal information to a third party: The personal information may be provided to relevant government agencies, such as Korea Internet & Security Agency and the Financial Supervisory Service, and related institutions, corporations, and organizations to achieve the purpose of collection including request for suspension of provision of telecommunications services to telephone numbers used in telecommunications financial fraud.
※ Reporting will be unavailable and cannot be processed if you do not give your consent to the collection and use personal information."
